channel.title: research methods on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in research methods on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: Is MTurk having a data quality crisis?
item.description: Is MTurk having a “data quality crisis”? In August 2018, there was an event that I like to call “MTurk botgate”. Basically, researchers on Twitter started to panic after some reported a sudden uptick in low quality data. Some researchers were seeing the same kinds of nonsense response patterns to open-ended survey questions by large numbers of participants, and were also seeing repeated geo-locations appear in their datasets (more on this later).
